occupation: ISBA Executive Committee Member at ISBA
headline: Brand, Marketing & Advertising Leader | WACL Member | ISBA ExCom | 20+ yrs experience in Financial Services (Lloyds, Amex) & Travel (TUI)
summary:
Experienced, proven, dynamic and passionate marketing communications leader, who has played a key role in building the strongest financial brands in the UK. 

Responsible for the strategy, planning and creation of best-in-class marketing communications across Lloyds Bank, Halifax, Scottish Widows and Bank of Scotland brands. Managing and steering c£70m of media and creative investment, driving forward efficient and effective communications across our brands. 

An innovative leader skilled in navigating complex organisations, inspiring teams, influencing at all levels and delivering market leading, creatively inspired, integrated communications across paid, owned, and earned channels, ensuring every customer touchpoint drives maximum reach, impact, relevance, and business results.

experiences.title: ISBA Executive Committee Member
experiences.description: Empowering ISBA members to unlock the full potential of the UK’s most effective media platforms.

experiences.title: WACL Member
experiences.description: Champion gender equality and inclusive leadership in advertising, marketing, and communications.

experiences.title: Head of Brand, Marketing & Advertising
experiences.description: Lead the development, design and delivery of best in class, market leading, integrated, innovative, creative excellent, brand and product communications across paid, owned and earned media channels for Lloyds Bank (UK, Islands & International) Halifax and Bank of Scotland brands. Shape, create and deploy efficient and effective media plans that deliver on our brand objectives Lead the creation of integrated comms plans that deliver against defined comms priorities across paid, owned and earned channels. Direct, collaborate, educate and influence key strategic business partners across the comms ecosystem to drive success across our integrated comms plan. Relentless focus on business performance, ensuring that end of year objectives are achieved. Lead exceptional relationships with creative, media, CRM and social agencies to plan, create and deliver outstanding, efficient and effective communications across our brands. LBG communications lead on governance and process, evaluating, identifying and implementing key areas of process efficiencies within the team. LBG exec sponsor in driving sustainable and inclusive communications across our portfolio of brands. LBG partner lead with external industry bodies including Advertising Association, ASA, Ad Net Zero, Front Foot and ISBA.

experiences.title: Marketing Manager
experiences.description:
-	Spearheaded the most ambitious and high-profile partnerships in financial services history – London 2012 Olympic games.
-	Orchestrated campaign’s that reached millions, blending cultural relevance with commercial impact.

experiences.title: Marketing Executive
experiences.description: Support the creation and delivery of a 360-degree customer communication strategy focused on growing the engagement and loyalty of customers. Support the development and implementation of a new and innovative customer communication strategy to increase current customer spend, grow the number of products and services held by the customer, reduce customer attrition and improve overall customer satisfaction. Plan, manage and develop comprehensive campaigns, combining 121 and interactive/digital media Manage the relationship with the merchant services team to define and develop the merchant propositions needed to create customer communications. Responsible for delivering post campaign analysis with the aim of identifying both the strengths and weaknesses of each campaign, and to incorporate this analysis into future strategies.

experiences.title: Campaign Manager - Thomson Holidays
experiences.description:
-	Steered the development and promotion of Thomson Holidays, Cruises, and Thomsonfly airline through market-leading multimedia, advertising campaigns, reinforcing position as the UK’s #1 travel brand.
-	Acted as Brand guardian for all TUI UK brands, including Thomson TV, Retail, Cruises, Hotels, and Thomsonfly, ensuring consistency across sub-brands and digital products within the TUI UK brand portfolio.

experiences.title: Account Manager
experiences.description: Responsible for a number of B2B client accounts both large and small accounts including British Gas and Flogas for a small BTL full-service marketing agency Development of a new corporate identity including a national below the line advertising campaign for a medium to large sized company. Management and organisation of Conferences & Exhibitions. Manage and develop 1-2-1 communications, point of sale, brochures, merchandising and leaflets.

experiences.title: Sales & Marketing Co-Ordinator
experiences.description: Responsible for implementing an internal and external marketing communication strategy. Development and implementation of a new corporate image campaign. Improvement of internal communication including weekly newsletter, events etc. Lead all PR and internal communication.
